title: My Bag Didn't Make It
description: Report a missing checked bag at the airport service desk.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi, how can I help you?

templates.text: My checked bag wasn't on the carousel. I waited about thirty minutes.
templates.hint_zh: 我託運的行李沒出來,我等了大約三十分鐘。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Can I see your baggage tag?

templates.text: Sure, here it is. The flight was UA 213 from San Francisco.
templates.hint_zh: 好,在這。班機是舊金山飛來的 UA 213。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. Can you describe the bag?

templates.text: It's a black hard-shell suitcase, medium size, with a red ribbon on the handle.
templates.hint_zh: 黑色硬殼行李箱,中型,把手綁了紅色緞帶。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We'll trace it. Where can we deliver it once we find it?

templates.text: Marriott Downtown, room 802. I'm there until Thursday.
templates.hint_zh: Marriott Downtown 802 號房,我住到禮拜四。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Here's a reference number — you can track it online.

templates.text: Thanks for your help. Hope it shows up soon.
templates.hint_zh: 謝謝你幫忙,希望快點找到。
